title: GTM Advanced Hatch
description: a mod for gregtech ceu modern and gtmthings
body:
Retention Output Bus
1. Items can be placed or retrieved, but logistics can only retrieve.
2. When automatically outputting to the front container, one item is automatically retained per slot.
3. Holds more slots than output buses of the same tier, with lower construction costs. 4. Can be recognized by AE2's ME storage bus or external logistics. For example, if each slot holds 64 items, AE's storage bus will only read 63 items per slot.
   
Net Energy Hatch Series
1. Binds to network upon placement; flash card allows re-binding (same as wireless storage).
2. Feature 3 enables grid storage to support machines accelerated by entity accelerators without power storage latency concerns (tested up to 2.1 billion A MAX, no joke).
3. In parallel power outage scenarios, power output is conservatively twice that of wireless energy storage of the same tier.
4. When running recipes, operations directly interact with the grid. Grid Energy Caches consume electricity directly from the grid when machine recipes expend energy. Grid Power Caches, conversely, directly increase grid power when multi-block generators are operational.
5. Grid Caches typically offer up to 64A per tier, with laser variants reaching up to 65536A.
6. In GTL environments, this mod unlocks grid storage with up to 2.1 billion A MAX. Non-GTL environments lack these recipes.
7. Provides four high-amp grid energy storage and grid power storage units, restricted to LuV tiers and above (two amp levels require GTL environments). Crafting requires matching-tier grid laser storage units, making them costly. Used to replace energy storage in machines incompatible with laser storage later in the game.
8. Modules will automatically supplement certain ampere-rated wireless energy cells and their recipes.
9. When GTLAdd is present, the sixth slot will yield to GTLAdd (whose recipes are naturally much harder to obtain).
10. Grid cells paired with active transformers can yield unexpected results.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)


留存输出总线
1. 可以放入或取出物品，但物流只能取出。
2. 自动输出到面前容器时，会每一格自动留一个物品
3. 格子数比同级输出总线多，造价低
4.能被AE2的ME存储总线或外部物流识别，比如每一格有64物品，AE的存储总线只会每一格读取63个物品。
 
电网仓系列
1. 放下后绑定网络，闪存卡可换绑（同无线仓）
2. 第3条使得电网仓能随意支持机器被实体加速器加速而无需担心电源仓产生延迟（21亿A MAX我都测过了，逃
3. 并行跳电的环境下保守是同级无线能源仓两倍功率
4. 运行配方时直接对电网进行操作，电网能源仓在机器配方消耗能量时会直接消耗电网内电量。电网动力仓则会在多方块发电机运行时直接让电网增加电量。
5. 电网仓通常有各等级至多64A，激光版本至多65536A。
6. 在GTL环境下，该模组会解锁至多21亿A MAX的电网仓。在非GTL环境下这些会没有配方
7. 提供了4个较大安培数的电网能源仓和电网动力仓，仅限LuV以上等级（其中两个安培等级需要GTL环境才解锁），需要同等级电网激光仓制作，造价昂贵，用于后期替换一些无法使用激光仓的机器的能源仓。
8. 模组默认会补上一些安培数的无线能源仓及其配方。
9. GTLAdd存在时，第六条会为GTLAdd让路（GTLAdd的配方自然要难很多2333）
10. 电网仓和有源变压器配合会有意想不到的效果。
